name: automerge-swift
description: Automerge Swift CRDT skills, commands, and hooks — Document API, Codable mapping, sync protocol, auditing, and guardrails
author: sitapix

skills.name: automerge-swift
skills.description: Use when working with Automerge Swift, automerge-swift package, CRDTs in Swift, collaborative/real-time data, Document merge/fork/sync, or any code importing Automerge. Routes to specialized skills and agents.

skills.name: automerge-swift-modeling
skills.description: Use when designing Automerge document schemas, choosing between Text and String, structuring nested data for correct merges, solving the initial data problem, or setting up UTType/Transferable.

skills.name: automerge-swift-diag
skills.description: Use when debugging Automerge Swift errors, decoding failures, binding crashes, sync message corruption, type conversion errors, or schema mismatches after merge.
